{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Akura family crest
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Akura family crest]] consists of one great star flanked by two smaller stars over a mountain range.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6">''Underlord'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The stars and mountains of the [[Akura]] family emblem glow purple.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7">''Uncrowned'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
